creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

thanks for taking a look at my ports.

There are some problems with using the latest tag (0.2).
It is 3 years old, it does not compile with the latest VLC, and it is missing some bug fixes, which is why I opted to use the then latest commit instead.

I haven't yet asked upstream to tag a new release, but will do so if you think this is necessary.
